# Copilot instructions: DKAN 4.x + Drupal AI module authoring

This repository packages skills, reference docs, and scaffolding procedures for
writing custom Drupal modules that extend DKAN 4.x and the Drupal AI module
(`drupal/ai`, `ai_agents`). Canonical source lives under `plugins/drupal-dkan-ai/`.

Path-scoped instructions in `.github/instructions/` auto-attach when you edit
matching files. Reusable procedures are in `.github/prompts/` (run with `/<name>`).
For the full picture see [`AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md).

When working on DKAN or Drupal-AI module code, consult the reference docs under
`plugins/drupal-dkan-ai/skills/*/reference/` — they carry version-specific specifics
(DKAN 4.x `Drupal\dkan_*` namespaces, `drupal/ai 1.3.x` lifecycle) that prevent
common mistakes.
